title: penstemon fruticosus var. douglasii
intro: Penstemon fruticosus var. douglasii, also known as Douglas' Penstemon or Rocky Mountain Penstemon, is a perennial plant that belongs to the plantain family (Plantaginaceae) and is native to the western United States. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and antibacterial properties, which can help to heal wounds and prevent infection. The health benefits of Penstemon fruticosus var. douglasii include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat a variety of ailments, including colds, sore throats, and skin conditions.
